response:
Emily began the week with a total of 25 dogs at her rescue center located at [location]. She received 4 new puppies on Thursday and 1 stray dog on Friday, bringing the count to 30 before any adoptions occurred. The [date] of the adoptions was Saturday, when 2 families each took home 3 dogs, removing a total of 6 dogs from the [facility]. This leaves Emily with 24 dogs currently in her care at the [center].

The final calculation confirms that the [number] of dogs remaining is 24 after all the weekly changes. Emily can now focus on finding homes for these animals while managing the [budget] for their food and medical needs. The [staff] members are ready to welcome new arrivals next week at the [shelter]. Please contact the [phone] number to inquire about adoption procedures for the remaining dogs.
